suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add note to Testing & Validation Guidance: pytest 9.x changed `pytest.skip()` keyword argument from `msg=` to `reason=`. Existing test files that use `skip(msg=...)` or `pytest.skip(msg=...)` will raise `TypeError`. Always use `reason=` keyword.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature fix-pandas-3x-stringarray: neurolang/datalog/tests/test_chase.py line 359 had `skip(msg=...)` which failed with `TypeError: _Skip.__call__() got an unexpected keyword argument 'msg'` under pytest 9.x. The fix was `skip(reason=...)`.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: The skill procedure recommends naming venvs `.venv-312`, `.venv-313`, `.venv-314` for multi-version testing. Clarify that a single `.venv` re-created per version is also acceptable for sequential per-version runs, to avoid confusion.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature verify-zero-failures-all-versions: worker used `rm -rf .venv && uv venv --python 3.X .venv` pattern sequentially instead of named venvs. This is pragmatically correct for sequential testing.

rejectedObservations.observation: fix-numpy-nonzero-0d: Document np.atleast_1d() pattern for numpy 2.x in AGENTS.md or library
rejectedObservations.reason: Already documented in .factory/library/environment.md item 8: 'numpy 2.x changed...0d array behavior' and the specific fix is recorded under 'Python 3.12+ Compatibility Fixes Applied' item 8.

rejectedObservations.observation: fix-python314-annotations: Document __annotate__ vs __annotations__ nuance more thoroughly
rejectedObservations.reason: Low priority; the fix is documented in environment.md item 6. The nuance about __annotate__ being a lazy callable is a Python internals detail irrelevant to workers.

rejectedObservations.observation: fix-nilearn-destrieux-labels: Update architecture.md nilearn row to note labels API change
rejectedObservations.reason: The labels format change is already documented in environment.md item 9. The architecture.md nilearn row is about version constraints, not behavioral compatibility notes. Adding it there would be duplicative.

rejectedObservations.observation: fix-pandas-3x-stringarray: Document untracked pandas_duckdb.py having same old .loc pattern
rejectedObservations.reason: The file is untracked (??) and out of scope for committed code. Not worth documenting in shared state; document when/if the file gets committed.

rejectedObservations.observation: fix-pandas-3x-stringarray: Document pandas 3.x RangeIndex overflow with pd.concat nuance
rejectedObservations.reason: Already documented in environment.md item 7 (RelationalAlgebraSet.add() uses pd.concat fix). The specific RangeIndex root cause details are in commit history/handoff.
